title: centaurium erythraea subsp. suffruticosum
intro: Centaurium erythraea subsp. suffruticosum, also known as small or dwarf centaury, is a subspecies of the Centaurium erythraea plant, a perennial herb native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Centaurium erythraea subsp. suffruticosum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. This plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
